paper_announcements.summary: Paper review of LeWorldModel: Stable End-to-End Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture from Pixels, application of LeJEPA results to world models.
IBM released Granite 4.0-3B-Vision, a new vision language model for documents with state-of-the-art performance for its size on tables and charts.
Hugging Face releases TRL v1 with 75+ methods including SFT, DPO, GRPO, and async RL, built to be future-proof for post-training most open models.
Anthropic signs MOU with Australian Government to collaborate on AI safety research and support Australia's National AI Plan.
Release of Nemotron 3 Super post-training details from GTC2026 talk, with Ultra-3 post-training in progress.

discussions.summary: Discussion about a new supply chain attack targeting npm axios library, the most popular HTTP client with 300M weekly downloads.
Claude Code source code accidentally leaked and forked on GitHub with 32.6k stars before repositories started getting DMCA takedown notices.
Discussion about how Claude can't read music notation, with someone noting their expensive music degree was vindicated.
Commentary on OpenAI's latest funding round with $122 billion in committed capital at $852B valuation, noting coding agents as highest-ROI product.

announcements.summary: OpenAI announces closing latest funding round with $122 billion in committed capital at $852B post-money valuation.
Google releases Veo 3.1 Lite, a more cost-efficient video generation model launching April 7th with per-second pricing.
SHIFT UP acquires UNBOUND, the Tokyo-based game studio founded by Resident Evil creator Shinji Mikami.
Text Arena leaderboard shows Claude Opus 4.6 models remaining on top with new entrants Gemini-3.1 Pro, GPT-5.4 High, and Grok-4.20 Reasoning.

other.summary: Bernie Sanders responds to criticism about his wealth tax proposal, stating it would require billionaires to pay more while families making $150k or less would receive payments.
Barack Obama promotes National Run for Office Day and encourages people to check out resources for running for political office.
Heartwarming story about Molly the dog who was found a week after her human fell down a 180-foot waterfall in New Zealand and was rescued.
Breaking news about a judge ordering the Trump administration to halt construction of $400 million White House ballroom unless Congress approves the plan.
